message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Retain resources on destroy mission (#835)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-1615-retain-resources-on-destroy",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Retain resources on destroy",
+    "description": "Retain resources on destroy. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```\nThis feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "### Use Cases\n\nWhen creating certain resources that we need to keep when deleting the environment, I don't want to do any manual actions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Retain resources on destroy",
+        "description": "This PR introduces a\n```hcl\nresource \"time_rotating\" \"example\" {\n  rotation_days = 320\n}\n\nresource \"grafana_cloud_access_policy_token\" \"this\" {\n  region           = \"us\"\n  access_policy_id = grafana_cloud_access_policy.this.policy_id\n  name             = \"${local.cluster_name}-policy-token-${time_rotating.example.year}-${time_rotating.example.day}-${time_rotating.example.month}\"\n  display_name     = \"${local.cluster_name} Policy Token\"\n  expires_at       = timeadd(time_rotating.example.rotation_rfc3339, \"1080h\") # add 45 days to the rotation time\n\n  lifecycle {\n    create_before_destroy = true\n  }\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the feature described in \"Retain resources on destroy\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Please make sure you go through the checklist below. If your PR does not meet all requirements, please file it\nas a draft PR. Core team members will only review your PR once it meets all the requirements below (unless your\nchange is something as trivial as a typo fix).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "resource \"time_rotating\" \"example\" {\n  rotation_days = 320\n}\n\n\nresource \"grafana_cloud_access_policy_token\" \"this\" {\n  region           = \"us\"\n  access_policy_id = grafana_cloud_access_policy.this.policy_id\n  name             = \"${local.cluster_name}-policy-token-${time_rotating.example.year}-${time_rotating.example.day}-${time_rotating.example.month}\"\n  display_name     = \"${local.cluster_name} Policy Token\"\n  expires_at       = timeadd(time_rotating.example.rotation_rfc3339, \"1080h\") # add 45 days to the rotation time\n\n  lifecycle {\n    create_before_destroy = true\n  }\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentofu"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1615",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/3409"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "tofu"
+    ],
+    "description": "OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:42:54.007Z",
